mapper.select: SELECT fm.*, ub.name FROM FRIEND_MESSAGE fm LEFT JOIN USER_BASIC ub ON fm.friend_user_id = ub.user_id WHERE fm.user_id = ${param1} ORDER BY fm.insert_dt DESC LIMIT ${param2}, ${param3}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS receiveMsg_count FROM FRIEND_MESSAGE WHERE USER_ID=#{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS receiveMsg_count FROM FRIEND_MESSAGE WHERE USER_ID=#{userId} AND READ_YN = 'N'

SELECT fm.*, sender.name AS senderName, receiver.name AS recipientName FROM FRIEND_MESSAGE fm LEFT JOIN USER_BASIC sender ON fm.user_id = sender.user_id LEFT JOIN USER_BASIC receiver ON fm.friend_user_id = receiver.user_id WHERE fm.MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId}

SELECT fi.*, ub.name FROM FRIEND_INFO fi LEFT JOIN USER_BASIC ub ON fi.friend_user_id = ub.user_id WHERE fi.user_id = #{param1} AND ( fi.USER_NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param2}, '%') OR fi.FRIEND_USER_NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param2}, '%') OR ub.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param2}, '%') )
mapper.insert: insert INTO FRIEND_MESSAGE (USER_ID, FRIEND_USER_ID, MESSAGE, READ_YN, INSERT_USER_ID, INSERT_DT,UPDATE_USER_ID, UPDATE_DT) values (#{recipient}, #{userId}, #{sendMessage}, 'N', #{userId}, now(), #{userId}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT fm.*, ub.name FROM FRIEND_MESSAGE fm LEFT JOIN USER_BASIC ub ON fm.user_id = ub.user_id WHERE fm.FRIEND_USER_ID = ${param1} ORDER BY fm.insert_dt DESC LIMIT ${param2}, ${param3}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS sendMsg_count FROM FRIEND_MESSAGE WHERE FRIEND_USER_ID=#{userId}
